mapper.select: SELECT * FROM tb_dp_stress WHERE deleted = 0 ORDER BY total_score DESC, id DESC
SELECT * FROM tb_dp_stress WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_dp_stress WHERE deleted = 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_dp_stress WHERE deleted = 0 AND risk_level = #{riskLevel}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_dp_stress (worker_name, department, physical_env, job_demand, autonomy, relationship, job_insecurity, system_fairness, reward, work_culture, total_score, risk_level, assessment_date, has_counseling, counseling_notes, notes, deleted, created_at, modified_at) VALUES ( #{workerName}, #{department,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{physicalEnv,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{jobDemand,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{autonomy,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{relationship,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{jobInsecurity,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{systemFairness,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{reward,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{workCulture,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{totalScore,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{riskLevel,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{assessmentDate,jdbcType=DATE}, #{hasCounseling}0, #{counselingNotes,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{notes,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, 0, #{createdByUserId}, #{createdByName}, #{createdByTeam}, #{createdByPosition}, GETDATE(), GETDATE())
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_dp_stress SET worker_name = #{workerName}, department = #{department,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, physical_env = #{physicalEnv,jdbcType=INTEGER}, job_demand = #{jobDemand,jdbcType=INTEGER}, autonomy = #{autonomy,jdbcType=INTEGER}, relationship = #{relationship,jdbcType=INTEGER}, job_insecurity = #{jobInsecurity,jdbcType=INTEGER}, system_fairness = #{systemFairness,jdbcType=INTEGER}, reward = #{reward,jdbcType=INTEGER}, work_culture = #{workCulture,jdbcType=INTEGER}, total_score = #{totalScore,jdbcType=INTEGER}, risk_level = #{riskLevel,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, assessment_date = #{assessmentDate,jdbcType=DATE}, has_counseling = #{hasCounseling}0, counseling_notes = #{counselingNotes,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, notes = #{notes,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, modified_at = GETDATE() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE tb_dp_stress SET deleted = 1, modified_at = GETDATE() WHERE id = #{id}
